question:
Impuses are mean. Each impus is a yumpus. Yumpuses are blue. Yumpuses are wumpuses. Wumpuses are hot. Every wumpus is a numpus. Jompuses are happy. Numpuses are fruity. Numpuses are dumpuses. Every dumpus is not dull. Every dumpus is a tumpus. Tumpuses are not happy. Every tumpus is a vumpus. Vumpuses are not opaque. Every vumpus is a rompus. Rompuses are metallic. Each rompus is a zumpus. Rex is a yumpus.

Is the following statement true or false? Rex is not happy.
